task_completion.description: Navigate to the Users or Directory section in the 2N Access Commander interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2N Access Commander web interface is visible showing a list of users or the user management dashboard.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the profile for Sandra Okafor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user details or edit screen is open for the user with email s.okafor@buildingtech.com or the previously inverted name 'Okafor Sandra'.

task_completion.description: Correct the first and last name for Sandra Okafor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The First Name field contains 'Sandra' and the Last Name field contains 'Okafor', or the updated user list displays the name correctly as 'Sandra Okafor'.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the profile for Marcus Webb.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user details or edit screen is open for the user with email m.webb@buildingtech.com or the previously inverted name 'Webb Marcus'.

task_completion.description: Correct the first and last name for Marcus Webb.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The First Name field contains 'Marcus' and the Last Name field contains 'Webb', or the updated user list displays the name correctly as 'Marcus Webb'.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the profile for Mei-Ling Zhang.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user details or edit screen is open for the user with email m.zhang@buildingtech.com or the previously inverted name 'Zhang Mei-Ling'.

task_completion.description: Correct the first and last name for Mei-Ling Zhang.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The First Name field contains 'Mei-Ling' and the Last Name field contains 'Zhang', or the updated user list displays the name correctly as 'Mei-Ling Zhang'.

integrity.description: The agent used the 2N Access Commander web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and the 2N Access Commander GUI, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or database modifications.

integrity.description: The agent did not delete and recreate the user accounts.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the 'Delete User' confirmation dialog or the 'Create New User' form being used for these three specific users.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify any other users in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The user list should not show unexpected changes to other users' names or profiles; only Sandra, Marcus, and Mei-Ling should be edited.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exact users to be corrected are identified by their emails: s.okafor@buildingtech.com (Expected First: Sandra, Expected Last: Okafor), m.webb@buildingtech.com (Expected First: Marcus, Expected Last: Webb), and m.zhang@buildingtech.com (Expected First: Mei-Ling, Expected Last: Zhang).
